data.body:
Hello, Sensei!
 CM Arcie’s 24th Blue Archive live stream is just a day away – Don’t miss it!
 
 🗓️Date & Time: 6/18 (Wed) 0:00 AM (UTC)
 ➡️YouTube Link: https://youtube.com/live/dYaNBHiRWTg
